scripts.test: node tools/check.mjs && npm run test:content-feed && npm run test:language-corpus && node tools/ui-audit.mjs && node tools/verify-visual.mjs
scripts.audit:ui: UI_AUDIT_FUNCTIONAL_ONLY=1 node tools/ui-audit.mjs && UI_AUDIT_RESPONSIVE_ONLY=1 node tools/ui-audit.mjs
scripts.test:kuromoji: node tools/kuromoji-worker-lifecycle.test.mjs && node tools/kuromoji-app-consistency.test.mjs && node tools/kuromoji-build-cache.test.mjs
scripts.test:dictionary: node tools/lexical-record.test.mjs && node tools/lexical-lookup-plan.test.mjs && node tools/learning-indexes.test.mjs && node tools/jmdict-common.test.mjs && node tools/jmdict-browser.test.mjs && npm run test:vocab-persistence
scripts.test:language-corpus: node tools/language-corpus.test.mjs && node tools/language-corpus-browser.test.mjs && node tools/contextual-reading.test.mjs
